scripts.dev: node scripts/notion/fetch.mjs && node scripts/slug/generate.mjs && node scripts/recommendations/generate.mjs && next dev
scripts.dev:no-fetch: node scripts/slug/generate.mjs && node scripts/recommendations/generate.mjs && next dev
scripts.build: node scripts/notion/fetch.mjs && node scripts/slug/generate.mjs && node scripts/recommendations/generate.mjs && node scripts/engagement/fetch.mjs && next build
scripts.build:no-fetch: node scripts/slug/generate.mjs && node scripts/recommendations/generate.mjs && node scripts/engagement/fetch.mjs && next build
scripts.build:run: node scripts/notion/fetch.mjs && node scripts/slug/generate.mjs && node scripts/recommendations/generate.mjs && next build && next start
